trigger: 江南雪后庭院中，昭昭与几位赘婿候选人一起玩雪，甚至有雪球砸中沈词，呈现她最外放活跃的一面。

appearance_delta.face: 小脸被冷空气映得更红润，神情兴奋，眼神明亮外放
appearance_delta.body: 动作感最强，跑跳、捏雪球、在雪地中穿行，显得格外灵活
appearance_delta.hair: 小髻或垂发在冬日帽饰、披风领口映衬下更蓬松，可有轻微散乱感
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 从安静受护的幼女转为主动参与庭院游戏的小孩，童真与机灵感最鲜明

costume_override.outfit: 冬日幼女披风或夹袄外搭保暖小斗篷，内穿彩色小裙，适合雪地玩耍

visual_reference: ancient chinese little girl playing in a snowy Jiangnan courtyard, bright intelligent eyes, rosy cheeks, soft black hair in tiny buns, wearing a warm embroidered winter cape over colorful hanfu, holding a small snowball and child shovel, lively, playful, noble family child, snowman and courtyard gate in background, realistic cinematic style, crisp winter daylight
emotional_tone: 欢闹、天真、轻快中带戏剧张力
